title: Save retention protected pruning anchor receipt v1
description: Canonical immutable receipt authorizing absence of one fully validated ancestor prefix. Cross-field and envelope/pointer equality rules are normative in 04-TECHNICAL-ARCHITECTURE.md.

anchor_save_id.description: Stable save_id shared by the anchor, validated head, embedded pointer, and every generation in this lineage.

anchor_generation_digest.description: Exact whole_envelope_digest from the protected anchor generation header.

anchor_previous_generation.description: Immediate predecessor generation number, or null only when the anchor is genesis.

anchor_previous_generation_digest.description: Exact previous_generation_digest from the anchor header; retained even when the predecessor prefix is pruned.

validated_head_generation_digest.description: Exact whole_envelope_digest of the durable head validated when this receipt was created.

validated_pointer.description: Exact immutable canonical slot-pointer object that selected validated_head_generation when this receipt was created. It remains inside the receipt after mutable slot.current advances.

validated_pointer_digest.description: Must equal validated_pointer.pointer_digest after that embedded pointer independently passes the pointer v1 zero-field digest and every pointer-to-head equality rule.

prune_before_generation.description: Must equal anchor_generation; only confirmed ancestor-chain members with smaller generations are eligible.

supersedes_anchor_generation.description: Immediate predecessor receipt's anchor generation in the same non-forked supersession chain, or null only for the chain root.

supersedes_anchor_receipt_digest.description: Immediate predecessor receipt digest in the same non-forked supersession chain, or null only for the chain root.

receipt_digest.description: SHA-256 of the canonical receipt with this field replaced by 64 ASCII zeroes.
